outlook.volatilityExpectation: Suppressed intraday due to massive positive 0DTE GEX; potential volatility expansion if Weekly support breaks.
outlook.summary: Market is trapped between massive structural support at 23.4k (Weekly Max Pain) and resistance at 24.4k. Positive 1.01B GEX suggests dealers will suppress volatility and pin price.

levels.motivazione: Major Call Wall overlapping in Weekly (531 OI) and Monthly (97+94 OI). Primary structural resistance.
Weekly Max Pain aligning with massive Put OI (478). Strong magnetic support and dealer pivot point.
Largest 0DTE Put OI (563) with Monthly alignment (112 OI). Critical structural support.
0DTE Max Pain level. Price attraction target for end-of-day settlement.
Immediate 0DTE Call resistance (159 OI) capping upward movement near spot.
